summary: Iteration 14 — Phase 3 v37i submission↔global-talent media sync verified end-to-end. Backend pytest 14/14 PASS in /app/backend/tests/test_phase3_sync.py covering: (a) forward sync — uploading category=image/indian/western into a submission whose talent_email has a finalized db.talents record appears within <1s as a new item in /api/talents/{tid}.media[] with matching source_submission_media_id, preserved storage_path and category; (b) idempotency — 3 distinct uploads produce exactly 1 mirror each (no duplicates); (c) non-image categories intro_video and take are NOT mirrored (audition-scope respected); (d) DELETE /api/public/submissions/{sid}/media/{mid} removes the mirror from talent.media[]; (e) edge — submission with talent_email but no talent record yet does NOT crash pre-finalize; on finalize the talent is created with empty media (pre-finalize items are NOT retroactively mirrored, which is the intentional design), and the next upload AFTER finalize does mirror; (f) Siya kale smoke (existing backfilled talent, id=8275939b-58bb-4e3a-9cac-7517d18c6fd8) — /api/talents/{id}.media[] contains >=3 indian + >=2 western items, all carrying source_submission_media_id; (g) admin regression — /api/talents, /api/projects, /api/links, /api/applications, /api/submissions/approved all 200. Frontend smoke on /admin/talents/8275939b-... renders the INDIAN LOOK IMAGES and WESTERN LOOK IMAGES sections (previously empty; now populated — 'No files' only appears under ADDITIONAL PORTFOLIO + INTRODUCTION VIDEO). ClientView regression on /l/talentgram-x-comfort-9339a4 still returns Shivani Yadav media_cats={portfolio:4, indian:3, western:1, video:1}.
critical_code_review_comments: core.py sync_media_to_global_talent() L1404: the $ne filter on media.source_submission_media_id is correct for idempotency, but the update silently no-ops when the talent record doesn't exist at all. Current design depends on finalize creating the talent before post-finalize uploads arrive — pre-finalize uploads are silently NOT mirrored and there is no backfill hook inside submission_finalize. If product expects pre-finalize uploads to appear on the global profile as soon as finalize lands, add a post-finalize loop that iterates sub.media and calls sync_media_to_global_talent for each. Otherwise document this as intentional (talents only get mirrors for uploads that happen AFTER their first finalize).

remove_synced_media_from_global_talent() L1422: uses talent_email from the submission doc, which is correct. However, if a talent's email on db.talents was changed post-finalize (admin edit), the mirror would be orphaned — delete filter by email misses it. Safer: filter on {'media.source_submission_media_id': source_media_id} (no email scoping) — the source id is globally unique.

backfill_global_talent_media.py: confirm the backfill also preserves resized_storage_path + mime + size on the mirror (core.py does; backfill script should match to keep the global gallery thumbnails consistent).

No data-testid on the Indian look / Western look / Additional Portfolio section headers or image grids in TalentEdit.jsx — makes the frontend harder to assert automatically. Suggest adding data-testid='talent-media-section-indian/western/portfolio'.

success_rate.frontend: Smoke verified — TalentEdit now renders Indian+Western sections with media (no 'No files' under those headers); ClientView unchanged (8 portfolio-carousel images on Shivani Yadav).

seed_data_creation: Created several TEST_sync_*@example.com + TEST_pre_*@example.com submissions — each finalized into a db.talents entry. Harmless TEST_-prefixed data left in place for next iteration's regression runs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 v37i sync layer is fully wired and idempotent. When testing future phases that change media schema, re-run /app/backend/tests/test_phase3_sync.py to catch any regression in the source_submission_media_id contract. Siya kale (id=8275939b-58bb-4e3a-9cac-7517d18c6fd8, email=siyakale25@gmail.com) is the canonical backfilled talent — /api/talents/{id}.media[] returns 3 indian + 2 western with source_submission_media_id. To verify the forward-sync path manually: POST /api/public/projects/{slug}/submission + finalize (creates talent) + POST /api/public/submissions/{sid}/upload?category=indian → within <1s /api/talents/{tid}.media[] carries the mirror. Design note: pre-finalize uploads do NOT backfill at finalize time — only post-finalize uploads mirror. If product expects pre-finalize uploads to mirror too, main agent must add a loop in submission_finalize.
rca of the issue: Phase 3 v37i closes the original gap where submission media stayed project-scoped and db.talents[].media[] was populated only by admin-direct uploads. sync_media_to_global_talent now mirrors {image, indian, western} into the talent record using source_submission_media_id as the idempotency key; remove_synced_media_from_global_talent pulls the mirror on submission media delete. All mirror flow verified live against /api/talents/{id}. One design nuance worth escalating: pre-finalize uploads never mirror (because the talent record is created only on finalize and there is no retroactive loop). If that is a product gap, main agent should patch submission_finalize to iterate sub.media and call sync_media_to_global_talent for each eligible category after the talent upsert block.
